basic_details.job_title: IIT Ropar Field Investigator Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 12 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Ropar (IIT Ropar)
basic_details.short_information: The Indian Institute of Technology Ropar (IIT Ropar) has released the official Field Investigator Recruitment 2026 notification on its official website https://www.iitrpr.ac.in. A total of 12 vacancies have been announced under the IIT Ropar Field Investigator Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with a Postgraduate degree in Economics or any Social Science discipline with a minimum of 55% marks can apply via email on or before 01 July 2026. The age limit has not been specified in the official notification. The official notification PDF and application details are available below.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate in Economics or any Social Science discipline (with minimum 55% marks)
qualification.details: Postgraduate in Economics or any Social Science discipline (with minimum 55% marks)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Ropar Field Investigator Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 01-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Ropar Field Investigator Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIT Ropar Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Ropar Field Investigator Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 01-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Ropar Field Investigator Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Ropar Field Investigator position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Field Investigator post at IIT Ropar is July 1, 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Field Investigator role?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a Postgraduate degree in Economics or any Social Science discipline with a minimum of 55% marks to be eligible for this position.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Field Investigator post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 12 vacancies for the Field Investigator position announced by IIT Ropar.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Field Investigator position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Field Investigator role will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 20,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the IIT Ropar Field Investigator recruitment is through email submission.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the Field Investigator post?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Field Investigator role at IIT Ropar?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an initial email shortlisting followed by an offline interview for the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q8. Where is IIT Ropar located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Ropar is located in Rupnagar, Punjab, with the pincode 140001.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The Field Investigator position at IIT Ropar is a contractual job.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' link.
